name: codex-orchestrator
description: Default repository workflow plugin for file-backed design, planning, execution tracking, review gates, and document sync.

interface.shortDescription: Default repository workflow for file-backed planning, execution, and review gates
interface.longDescription: Codex Orchestrator makes design specs, implementation plans, category routing, runtime state, review gates, and plan synchronization first-class workflow artifacts so repository work defaults to a durable, file-backed execution flow instead of ad-hoc chat state.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Orchestrator as the default workflow for this repository task.
Turn the request into a spec, active plan, and bounded execution flow before making code changes.
Review the active plan, record step progress, route the task by category, and enforce review gates before acceptance.
